scripts.build: astro build && pagefind --site dist && node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(async (fs) => { await fs.rm('public/pagefind', { recursive: true, force: true }); await fs.cp('dist/pagefind', 'public/pagefind', { recursive: true }); console.log('Copied pagefind index to public/ for dev'); })"
